_comment: Worked example — derived from notification-preferences backlog. PBI-only test cases for Apex. Use as canonical shape reference when generating test-case JSON.

testCases.title: Authenticated User disables standup notifications from settings
preconditions: User is logged in and on Notification Preferences page

steps.expected: Notification Preferences page displays with category toggles

steps.action: Locate the Standup Reminders category toggle
steps.expected: Toggle is in the ON position

steps.action: Click the toggle to disable Standup Reminders
steps.expected: Toggle switches to OFF and a success toast confirms the change

testCases.expectedResult: Standup notification category is disabled; no standup notifications are delivered until re-enabled

traceability.userStory: As an Authenticated User, I want to toggle notification categories on or off so that I only receive alerts I care about

testCases.title: Preference change persists across sessions
preconditions: User has previously disabled a notification category

steps.action: Log out and log back in

steps.expected: PRD Review Requests toggle remains in the OFF position

testCases.expectedResult: Preference is persisted in the database and survives session boundaries

traceability.userStory: As an Authenticated User, I want to toggle notification categories on or off so that I only receive alerts I care about

testCases.title: API rejects invalid category name with 400

steps.expected: Response status is 400 with validation error message

testCases.expectedResult: Invalid category names are rejected without modifying any preferences

traceability.userStory: As an Authenticated User, I want to toggle notification categories on or off so that I only receive alerts I care about

testCases.title: Unauthenticated request to preferences API returns 401
testCases.expectedResult: Unauthenticated users cannot modify notification preferences

traceability.userStory: As an Authenticated User, I want to toggle notification categories on or off so that I only receive alerts I care about

testCases.title: Preferences page accessible via keyboard navigation

steps.expected: Toggle state changes same as mouse click

testCases.expectedResult: Notification Preferences toggles are fully keyboard-accessible

traceability.userStory: As an Authenticated User, I want to toggle notification categories on or off so that I only receive alerts I care about

automation.rationale: Screen reader verification requires manual testing beyond Playwright defaults

testCases.title: Notification Preferences hidden when feature flag is off

steps.expected: Notification Preferences section is not visible

testCases.expectedResult: Feature is hidden when flag is off

traceability.userStory: As an Authenticated User, I want to toggle notification categories on or off so that I only receive alerts I care about

explicitlyOutOfScope: Email notification preferences (deferred to future epic)

assumptions: Notification categories are defined in the system and match the PRD category list
Default state for all categories is ON until explicitly toggled off
